textByHash.0b7f0d3bc1f69b95a054cbf95c01225bde52dd8f: Poor human. You must not judge THE ABYSS by the standards of this world. You must learn to embrace your fear as part of the experience of THE ABYSS.
textByHash.1946f96ac3a386a270bd33fbffb351f9ad911ea8: Then you should enhance them further by raising the stakes. Next time you go to THE ABYSS you should take all your most valuable items with you.
textByHash.2133715225021cdf07172d02666735c6a1119bcf: Death is a small thing compared to the beauty of THE ABYSS.
textByHash.2ed79cdd6600b80cf592624ef169317e0f477e4c: I bet you just rush through it though. Everyone there is in such a rush. No one stops to appreciate the beauty of THE ABYSS.
textByHash.3d73ae3c7afdc452c74eea86ab85c7e4f4bc2c07: Cool for her maybe. How would you like to be stuck on a wall?
textByHash.42caad9e20a7a9c54dbfbd6bdfa5e5ed46f12341: Poor deluded fool. There is no hope for you at all.
textByHash.8d2f04abf09732ba4db09647cb2695e9406e09e4: You must take all your gold and all your most valued items, and take them into THE ABYSS without weapons or armour.
textByHash.994a1dcad2fc89b448411d09e193153922145fca: Cool for him maybe. How would you like to be stuck on a wall?
textByHash.ec322d527c0fd4446c1bfabc0a16b95500c4259d: Have you considered visiting THE ABYSS?
textByHash.f8deccee1293c74b0bf287377be88d71b9214a3e: But does not the fear contribute to your appreciation of THE ABYSS?
